locale.hint: Choose the language for the operator UI. Preference is synced to your account.
locale.savedLocally: Language updated for this browser. Server sync failed; local preference kept.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint: Choose which email alerts you receive for this account.
notifications.failureEmails: Email me when a task run fails permanently
notifications.failureEmailsHint: Sends a message when a run reaches a dead state after retries are exhausted.

outboundAllowHosts.title: Outbound host allowlist
outboundAllowHosts.hint: Optional. When set, scheduled HTTP calls may only target these hostnames (in addition to built-in SSRF protections). Leave empty to allow any public host.
outboundAllowHosts.label: Allowed hosts (one per line)
outboundAllowHosts.needsTenant: Select a tenant before editing the outbound allowlist.

audit.title: Audit logs
audit.subtitle: Recent tenant activity
audit.needsTenant: Select a tenant to view audit logs.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Machine access credentials
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? It will stop working immediately and cannot be restored.
apiKeys.emptyHint: Create a key for automation or integrations.
apiKeys.needsTenant: Select a tenant before managing API keys.
apiKeys.plaintextWarning: This secret is shown only once. Store it securely before leaving this page.

fields.name: Name
fields.environmentHint: Optional. Cannot be changed after create.
fields.expiresAtHint: Optional. Leave empty for no expiry.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: People with access to this tenant
members.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the tenant? They will lose access immediately.
members.emptyHint: Invite a teammate to collaborate in this tenant.
members.needsTenant: Select a tenant before managing members.

fields.name: Name
fields.nameHint: Used when creating a new account for this email.

retention.title: Retention
retention.subtitle: Platform defaults for how long execution and audit data is kept. Read-only.
retention.hint: These values come from server configuration (RETENTION_*). Per-tenant overrides are not available yet.
